prompt:
Create a refined high-quality mobile UI design based on Option 5 for a Chinese teacher mini-program My page. Target dimensions: 864 x 1536 portrait. Single screen only, no device frame. Keep the Option 5 structure: compact identity header, 常用功能 card, 更多功能 card, bottom tab bar. Improve mobile proportions and technology visual tone.

Critical corrections: make typography smaller and more app-like. Use realistic mobile hierarchy: page-level text not giant, section title medium bold, function labels compact and readable. Reduce icon size to standard mobile shortcut scale, around 88px visual icon inside 120px touch area. Icons should be clean gradient app icons with light 3D depth, not oversized decorative illustrations. Keep consistent icon sizes across all entries.

Tech style: create a bright AI teacher assistant atmosphere using diffuse gradient background, cyan-to-blue-to-lilac mist, transparent glass cards, fine luminous contour lines, tiny soft light particles, and subtle gradient borders. Avoid childish learning-app style. Avoid flat plain white page. Avoid heavy shadows. Avoid orange dominant color; yellow only as tiny coin accent.

Content: Header shows real Chinese female teacher portrait, 刘飞飞老师, 成都七中初中附属小学, source pill 成都市未来实验小学, scan and settings icon buttons. 常用功能 entries: 学校数据报表, 生成期末报告, 货币发放, 我的文件. 更多功能 entries: 科目管理, 部门管理, 建议反馈, 班级来源, 扫一扫, 设置. Bottom nav: 记录, 班级, 我的 selected with cyan-blue active color. No explanations, no annotations, no business notes, no extra invented features.
